title: Research governance timeline through Gate 5
caption: Human decisions closed Gates 0-5 by 2026-07-13; Gate 5 closed as a preregistered technical FAIL, while Gate 6 remains unopened.
claim_boundary: Decision-state evidence only; the FAIL applies to the preregistered development benchmark and is not a universal claim about QML.

title: Pre-D003 F0 payload conformance failure
caption: All pre-D003 F0 rows failed the frozen schema; non-U0 groups also used non-frozen uncertainty scales.
claim_boundary: Diagnostic evidence only; prohibited as model-performance evidence.

title: Pre-D003 F0 feasibility coverage
caption: The invalid generator produced sparse feasible candidates and no feasible reference in most decision sets.
claim_boundary: Diagnostic evidence only; rates cannot support a benchmark claim.

title: Pre-D003 F0 generation runtime
caption: Observed F0 attempt runtime by group on the reference laptop before generator repair.
claim_boundary: Hardware timing for an invalid workload; retained only for scheduling and audit.

title: F0 G01 pre/post D003 qualification audit
caption: The first D003-v1 checkpoint removed all G01 schema and relationship errors and restored a feasible reference in every decision set.
claim_boundary: Development qualification only; G01 is nominal U0 and does not establish all-family or higher-fidelity validity.

title: F0 G01 pre/post D003 runtime
caption: The corrected 500-row G01 run completed in 55.9 seconds on the reference laptop versus 46.2 seconds for the latest invalid attempt.
claim_boundary: Single-group wall time; the workloads differ and this is not a speed benchmark.

title: All F0 pre/post D003 conformance
caption: D003-v1 removed all recorded schema, relationship, and uncertainty-conformance failures across the 7,000 unlocked F0 rows.
claim_boundary: Conformance evidence only; this does not establish model performance or higher-fidelity validity.

title: Valid D003-v1 F0 feasibility coverage
caption: Across valid F0 payloads, 2,339 of 7,000 candidates are feasible and 319 of 1,400 decision sets have no feasible numerical reference.
claim_boundary: Development/calibration diagnostic only; calibration groups are shaded and cannot support model selection.

title: D003-v1 F0 generation runtime
caption: The 14 corrected F0 groups required 542.1 seconds of measured group work on the reference laptop, with 16.4-56.7 seconds per 500 rows.
claim_boundary: Serial local wall time for F0 only; it is not a projection of F1/F2 cost.

title: Valid D003-v1 F1 feasibility coverage
caption: All 35,000 F1 rows pass strict audit; 6,436 candidates are feasible and 4,215 of 7,000 decision sets have no feasible numerical reference.
claim_boundary: Development/calibration coverage diagnostic only; calibration groups are marked and cannot support model fitting or selection.

title: D003-v1 F1 generation runtime
caption: The 13-group four-worker F1 scale-up consumed 63,639.442 seconds of summed group work in 18,148.400 seconds of wall time, for effective concurrency 3.51 on the reference laptop.
claim_boundary: Reference-hardware scheduling evidence only; G01 was a separate serial checkpoint and runtime does not measure model or mission performance.

title: Post-acceptance Gate 4 literature discovery refresh
caption: The post-acceptance refresh records 4,218 unique discovery rows: 3,288 title/abstract exclusions, 926 pending full-text screens, and four provisional includes; the 23 accepted extracted records remain unchanged.
claim_boundary: Discovery-flow evidence only; the refresh is incomplete and did not alter the accepted Gate 4 model, threshold, split, or evidence claims.

title: Valid D003-v1 G01 F0/F1/F2 checkpoint
caption: F0, F1, and F2 G01 all pass strict audit with 80% feasible candidates and a feasible numerical reference in every nominal-U0 decision set; F2 G01 required 450.835 seconds for 250 rows.
claim_boundary: Nominal-U0 development qualification only; row counts and force-model workloads differ, and the timing values do not measure model or mission performance.

title: Valid D003-v1 F2 feasibility coverage
caption: All 3,500 F2 rows pass strict audit; 642 candidates are feasible and 423 of 700 decision sets have no feasible numerical reference.
claim_boundary: Development/calibration coverage diagnostic only; calibration groups are marked and cannot support model fitting or selection.

title: D003-v1 F2 generation runtime
caption: The 13-group two-worker F2 scale-up consumed 15,604.130 seconds of summed group work in 7,978.900 seconds of wall time, for effective concurrency 1.96 on the reference laptop.
claim_boundary: Reference-hardware scheduling evidence only; G01 was a separate serial checkpoint and runtime does not measure model or mission performance.

title: D003-v1 full unlocked scenario campaign audit summary
caption: All 45,500 unlocked F0/F1/F2 rows pass strict audit; 9,417 candidates are feasible and 4,957 of 9,100 decision sets have no feasible numerical reference.
claim_boundary: Exact fidelity-level diagnostic table only; different force-model workloads are not a speed benchmark and no value is model-performance evidence.

title: Gate 5 literature-hardening controls
caption: Primary and official literature was translated into pre-fit Gate 5 controls: ranking guards, required diagnostics, matched interpretation controls, deferred QRL topics, and excluded non-primary claims.
claim_boundary: Process-control evidence only; this figure adds no model family, split, threshold, final-test access, or model-performance claim.

title: Gate 5 grouped cross-validation fold allocation
caption: All 39,000 development rows are assigned by whole frozen groups to one of five validation folds; each fold retains F0, F1, and F2 coverage.
claim_boundary: Outcome-blind methods evidence only; unequal two- and three-group fold sizes motivate pooled out-of-fold primary scoring and separate fold diagnostics.

title: Gate 5 development learning curves and matched controls
caption: Pooled development-only evidence covers every authorized rung and matched PCA dimension; terminally nonadvancing families stop at their frozen retention gate.
claim_boundary: Development model-selection evidence only; no calibration, final-test, mission, or hardware-advantage claim.

title: Gate 5 selected model 20-seed summary
caption: Selected candidate families are summarized over the 20 frozen development seed indices.
claim_boundary: Development stability evidence only; the chart cannot establish final-test or mission performance.

title: Gate 5 algorithm-trigger regime controls
caption: The preregistered trigger is shown beside the strongest classical and tuned dequantization controls.
claim_boundary: A passing development trigger could support human authorization of one algorithm study only; it is not quantum advantage or flight evidence.

title: Post-Gate-5 exploratory protocol boundary
